      (0): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)

        (embedding): Embedding(256, 32)
      )

        (embedding): Embedding(256, 32)
      )

        (embedding): Embedding(256, 32)
      )
    )
  )

    (mlp_layers): Sequential(
      (0): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)

      (2): ReLU()

      (13): Linear(in_features=512, out_features=768, bias=True)
    )
  )
